> **Type:** Advanced self-paced course (16 modules, AI-integrated)
> **Source ID:** SG-RMBC-II
> **Status:** COMPLETE

## OVERVIEW

```
╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
║                                                                              ║
║   RMBC II — Stefan Georgi's 2025 Advanced Copywriting System                 ║
║                                                                              ║
║   The evolution of the RMBC Method for the AI era. Integrates LLM-          ║
║   assisted research, Claude-powered VSL projects, and a completely           ║
║   new scoring framework (15 Funnel Factors) for diagnosing and               ║
║   optimizing entire funnels — not just individual copy pieces.               ║
║                                                                              ║
║   MAJOR ADVANCEMENT: Shifts from "write better copy" to "engineer           ║
║   better funnels" — covering advertorials, PDPs, checkouts, ads,            ║
║   upsells, and email sequences as interconnected conversion systems.         ║
║                                                                              ║
║   16 modules | 225 files | ~120 DNA elements extracted                       ║
║                                                                              ║
╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝
```

## MODULE BREAKDOWN

### Core Modules (16)

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  MODULE STRUCTURE — RMBC II (2025)                                           │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                             │
│  ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════     │
│  BLOCK 1: DEEP RESEARCH WITH AI (Modules 1-4)                              │
│  ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════     │
│                                                                             │
│  MODULE 1: AI-POWERED RESEARCH FOUNDATIONS                                  │
│  └── Using LLMs to accelerate the research phase of RMBC                   │
│  └── Prompt engineering for market research, avatar profiling               │
│  └── Systematic AI workflows for competitor analysis                       │
│                                                                             │
│  MODULE 2: DEEP RESEARCH — MARKET ANALYSIS                                  │
│  └── AI-assisted deep dives into market pain points and desires            │
│  └── Language mining with LLMs (extracting customer vocabulary)            │
│  └── Automated research document compilation                               │
│                                                                             │
│  MODULE 3: DEEP RESEARCH — PRODUCT ANALYSIS                                 │
│  └── Using AI to map product mechanisms and differentiators                │
│  └── Ingredient/feature research automation                                │
│  └── Proof element discovery and organization                              │
│                                                                             │
│  MODULE 4: DEEP RESEARCH — COMPETITIVE LANDSCAPE                            │
│  └── AI-powered swipe file analysis at scale                               │
│  └── Competitor positioning maps                                           │
│  └── Gap identification for unique mechanism opportunities                 │
│                                                                             │
│  ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════     │
│  BLOCK 2: STRATEGIC FOUNDATIONS (Modules 5-7)                               │
│  ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════     │
│                                                                             │
│  MODULE 5: PRODUCT-MARKET AWARENESS                                         │
│  └── Schwartz awareness levels applied to modern markets                   │
│  └── Traffic temperature mapping to copy strategy                          │
│  └── Awareness-to-copy-type decision matrix                                │
│                                                                             │
│  MODULE 6: UMP IDEATION WITH LLMs                                           │
│  └── Unique Mechanism Proposition (UMP) development using AI               │
│  └── Brainstorming 50+ mechanisms with LLM assistance                     │
│  └── Mechanism scoring and selection criteria                              │
│  └── From "product feature" to "unique mechanism story"                    │
│                                                                             │
│  MODULE 7: VSL STRUCTURE THEORY                                             │
│  └── Updated VSL architecture for modern attention spans                   │
│  └── Hook → Problem → Mechanism → Proof → Offer → Close                   │
│  └── Retention mechanics, pattern interrupts, pacing theory                │
│  └── Optimal VSL length by traffic temperature and niche                   │
│                                                                             │
│  ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════     │
│  BLOCK 3: BRIEF 2.0 AND AI EXECUTION (Modules 8-10)                        │
│  ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════     │
│                                                                             │
│  MODULE 8: BRIEF 2.0                                                        │
│  └── The 23-Question Brief — a complete pre-writing diagnostic             │
│  └── Questions cover: avatar, mechanism, proof, objections, offer,         │
│      voice, compliance, competitive positioning, emotional journey          │
│  └── Every question has a specific output that feeds into copy             │
│  └── "Answer the 23 questions and the copy practically writes itself."     │
│                                                                             │
│  MODULE 9: CLAUDE VSL PROJECTS                                              │
│  └── End-to-end VSL creation workflow using Claude                         │
│  └── Prompt architecture for each RMBC phase                               │
│  └── Quality control checkpoints between AI-generated sections             │
│  └── Human-AI collaboration model (AI drafts, human refines)              │
│  └── Specific Claude project setups and system prompts                     │
│                                                                             │
│  MODULE 10: AI COPY REFINEMENT                                              │
│  └── Iterative improvement protocols for AI-generated copy                 │
│  └── Voice matching, emotional calibration, proof integration              │
│  └── "AI is the first draft machine. You are the editor-in-chief."        │
│                                                                             │
│  ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════     │
│  BLOCK 4: FULL FUNNEL COPY (Modules 11-14)                                  │
│  ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════     │
│                                                                             │
│  MODULE 11: ADVERTORIALS                                                    │
│  └── Native ad copy for cold traffic conversion                            │
│  └── Bridge page architecture                                              │
│  └── Compliance-safe advertorial patterns                                  │
│  └── Presell → click → convert flow design                                │
│                                                                             │
│  MODULE 12: PDPs (PRODUCT DETAIL PAGES)                                     │
│  └── E-commerce and supplement PDPs optimized for conversion               │
│  └── Feature-to-benefit mapping                                            │
│  └── Social proof integration, FAQ architecture                            │
│  └── Above-fold optimization                                               │
│                                                                             │
│  MODULE 13: CHECKOUTS                                                       │
│  └── Checkout page optimization for reducing cart abandonment              │
│  └── Trust elements, micro-copy, progress indicators                       │
│  └── Upsell/cross-sell placement strategy                                  │
│  └── Guarantee positioning within checkout flow                            │
│                                                                             │
│  MODULE 14: ADS                                                             │
│  └── 29 files covering Facebook, YouTube, native, and search ads          │
│  └── Ad-to-page congruence methodology                                     │
│  └── Hook-based ad frameworks                                              │
│  └── Creative testing protocols                                            │
│  └── Compliance-first ad writing                                           │
│                                                                             │
│  ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════     │
│  BLOCK 5: FUNNEL OPTIMIZATION (Modules 15-16)                               │
│  ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════     │
│                                                                             │
│  MODULE 15: 15 FUNNEL FACTORS                                               │
│  └── ★ SIGNATURE FRAMEWORK OF RMBC II ★                                    │
│  └── Comprehensive scoring rubric for diagnosing funnel performance        │
│  └── Each factor scored 1-10 with specific benchmarks                      │
│  └── Total score predicts funnel profitability                             │
│  └── Diagnostic tool: "Where is the bottleneck?"                           │
│  └── See KEY FRAMEWORKS section for full breakdown                         │
│                                                                             │
│  MODULE 16: UPSELLS + EMAIL MARKETING                                       │
│  └── Post-purchase upsell architecture                                     │
│  └── Email sequence design for front-end and back-end                      │
│  └── Lifetime value maximization through copy touchpoints                  │
│  └── Bonus content and supplementary strategies                            │
│                                                                             │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

---

## KEY FRAMEWORKS EXTRACTED

### Tier 1: Signature Systems

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                                                                             │
│  15 FUNNEL FACTORS — Funnel Diagnostic Scoring Rubric                       │
│  ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════                       │
│                                                                             │
│  Each factor scored 1-10. Total score predicts profitability.               │
│                                                                             │
│   1. OFFER STRENGTH          — Is the offer irresistible?                   │
│   2. MECHANISM CLARITY       — Is the "why it works" obvious?               │
│   3. PROOF DENSITY           — Enough evidence to overcome skepticism?      │
│   4. LEAD/HOOK QUALITY       — Does it stop the scroll?                     │
│   5. COPY CONGRUENCE         — Ad → page → checkout → upsell aligned?      │
│   6. TRAFFIC-COPY FIT        — Copy matches the traffic temperature?        │
│   7. HEADLINE POWER          — Does the headline command attention?         │
│   8. STORY ENGAGEMENT        — Is the narrative compelling?                 │
│   9. OBJECTION HANDLING      — Are objections pre-empted in copy?           │
│  10. CTA CLARITY             — Is the next step unmistakably clear?         │
│  11. URGENCY/SCARCITY        — Is there a reason to act NOW?               │
│  12. GUARANTEE STRENGTH      — Does the guarantee dissolve risk?            │
│  13. PRICE-VALUE GAP         — Is perceived value >> price?                 │
│  14. UPSELL ARCHITECTURE     — Post-purchase flow maximizes AOV?            │
│  15. EMAIL FOLLOW-UP         — Non-buyers being nurtured to convert?        │
│                                                                             │
│  SCORING:                                                                   │
│  • 120-150: Elite funnel (top 1%)                                          │
│  • 100-119: Strong performer                                                │
│  • 80-99:  Average (room for improvement)                                   │
│  • 60-79:  Underperforming (fix urgently)                                   │
│  • <60:    Broken (major overhaul needed)                                    │
│                                                                             │
│  USE: Score each factor → identify lowest scores → fix those first          │
│  "Fix the weakest factor and you fix the whole funnel."                     │
│                                                                             │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                                                                             │
│  BRIEF 2.0 — The 23-Question Pre-Writing Diagnostic                         │
│  ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════                         │
│                                                                             │
│  An evolved version of the original RMBC Brief. Structured as 23            │
│  questions that must be answered BEFORE writing copy. Each answer           │
│  directly feeds a specific section of the final copy.                       │
│                                                                             │
│  Categories:                                                                │
│  • Avatar & Market (Q1-5): Who, pain, desires, awareness, sophistication   │
│  • Mechanism & Product (Q6-10): UMP, how it works, differentiators         │
│  • Proof & Credibility (Q11-14): Evidence types, testimonials, data        │
│  • Objections & Fears (Q15-18): Pre-emption strategy, risk reversal       │
│  • Offer & Close (Q19-23): Stack, price, guarantee, urgency, CTA          │
│                                                                             │
│  "If you can't answer all 23 questions, you're not ready to write."        │
│                                                                             │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                                                                             │
│  AI-ASSISTED COPYWRITING WORKFLOW                                           │
│  ═════════════════════════════════                                          │
│                                                                             │
│  Stefan's framework for human-AI collaboration in copy creation:            │
│                                                                             │
│  PHASE 1: AI RESEARCH                                                       │
│  └── LLM-powered market research, avatar profiling, competitor analysis    │
│  └── Human validates and supplements AI findings                           │
│                                                                             │
│  PHASE 2: AI MECHANISM BRAINSTORM                                           │
│  └── Generate 50+ mechanism candidates with LLM                            │
│  └── Human scores and selects top 3, refines winner                        │
│                                                                             │
│  PHASE 3: BRIEF 2.0 (23 Questions)                                         │
│  └── Human answers questions, AI helps structure responses                 │
│  └── AI generates section-by-section outline from brief                    │
│                                                                             │
│  PHASE 4: AI DRAFT → HUMAN EDIT                                            │
│  └── Claude VSL Projects: AI generates first draft per section             │
│  └── Human refines voice, emotion, proof integration                       │
│  └── Quality checkpoints between each section                              │
│                                                                             │
│  PHASE 5: FUNNEL INTEGRATION                                               │
│  └── Apply 15 Funnel Factors scoring to entire funnel                      │
│  └── AI helps identify weak factors                                        │
│  └── Iterate on lowest-scoring elements                                    │
│                                                                             │
│  "AI is the first draft machine. You are the editor-in-chief."             │
│                                                                             │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### Tier 2: Tactical Frameworks

| Framework | Module | Description |
|-----------|--------|-------------|
| UMP Ideation Protocol | 6 | Systematic mechanism brainstorming with LLMs (50+ candidates → scoring → selection) |
| Product-Market Awareness Matrix | 5 | Decision matrix matching Schwartz levels to copy strategy |
| VSL Structure Theory (2025) | 7 | Updated VSL architecture for modern attention spans |
| Claude VSL Project Setup | 9 | End-to-end AI workflow: system prompts, project configs, section-by-section generation |
| Advertorial Bridge Architecture | 11 | Presell → click → convert flow design for cold traffic |
| PDP Conversion Framework | 12 | Above-fold optimization, proof integration, FAQ architecture |
| Checkout Optimization Protocol | 13 | Trust elements, micro-copy, guarantee positioning |
| Ad-to-Page Congruence | 14 | Hook-based ad frameworks matched to landing page messaging |
| Post-Purchase Upsell Flow | 16 | Architecture for maximizing AOV through copy touchpoints |

### Tier 3: Philosophies & Heuristics (New in RMBC II)

| Element | Layer | Key Insight |
|---------|-------|-------------|
| "AI is the first draft machine" | L1 | Human-AI collaboration model for copy |
| "Fix the weakest factor" | L1 | Bottleneck theory applied to funnels |
| "Funnels, not pages" | L2 | Think in systems, not isolated pieces |
| 23 questions before writing | L3 | Zero tolerance for starting copy without complete brief |
| Score each funnel factor 1-10 | L3 | Quantitative diagnostic for qualitative output |
| 50+ mechanism candidates per project | L3 | AI enables quantity-first brainstorming |
| Ad-to-page message match > 90% | L3 | Congruence threshold for conversion |
| 15 Funnel Factors minimum score 80 | L3 | Below 80 = underperforming, action required |
